mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_qstn_category WHERE CTG_DEPTH = #{ctgDepth} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT * FROM t_qstn_category WHERE CTG_DEPTH = #{ctgDepth} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT * FROM t_qstn_category WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CTGRY_DEPTH = #{ctgDepth} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT * FROM t_qstn_category a WHERE QSTN_CTG_SEQ = #{qstnCtgSeq}
SELECT a.parent_seq , a.ctg_depth FROM t_qstn_category a WHERE CTGRY_SEQ = #{qstnCtgSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_qstn_category( CTG_NM, CTG_DEPTH, PARENT_SEQ, USE_YN, ORDER_NO, UPD_DE )VALUES( #{ctgNm}, #{ctgDepth}, #{parentSeq}, #{useYn}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ORDER_NO), 0)+1 FROM t_qstn_category AS T), #{updDe} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_qstn_category SET CTG_NM = #{ctgNm}, USE_YN = #{useYn} WHERE QSTN_CTG_SEQ = #{qstnCtgSeq}
mapper.select: /** 자식 카테고리 리스트 */ SELECT * FROM t_qstn_category WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND PARENT_SEQ = #{parentSeq} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
/** 자식 카테고리 리스트 */ SELECT * FROM t_qstn_category WHERE PARENT_SEQ = #{parentSeq} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
/** 자식 카테고리 리스트 */ SELECT * FROM t_qstn_category WHERE PARENT_SEQ = #{parentSeq} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
SELECT a.* FROM t_qstn_category a where a.qstn_ctg_seq = (select parent_seq from t_qstn_category where qstn_ctg_seq = #{qstnCtgSeq})
